student.name: Learner
student.target: Backend NestJS Intern/Fresher/Junior - high-intensity foundation first

weeks.title: Backend mindset, Internet, HTTP và API fundamentals

days.topic: Theory Deep Dive: Backend mindset: framework là công cụ, backend là protocol + data + failure handling
Theory Deep Dive: Internet fundamentals: DNS, TCP/IP, TLS, latency, timeout, request lifecycle

advanced.title: High Performance Browser Networking - Building Blocks of TCP

days.topic: Theory Deep Dive: HTTP/API fundamentals: method, status code, headers, body, cookie, cache, CORS, REST constraints

advanced.title: High Performance Browser Networking - Transport Layer Security (TLS)

days.topic: Mini Lab: HTTP lab: dùng curl/Postman mô phỏng request lifecycle, headers, status code, timeout và CORS
Mini Lab: API design lab: thiết kế API contract nhỏ, idempotency, pagination, filtering và error response

weeks.title: TypeScript/OOP, NestJS mental model và backend code organization

days.topic: Theory Deep Dive: TypeScript foundation: type, interface, class, generic, error typing, runtime vs compile time
Theory Deep Dive: OOP for backend: encapsulation, composition over inheritance, polymorphism, value object mindset
Theory Deep Dive: Dependency Injection and modular design: why DI exists, dependency direction, testability
Mini Lab: TypeScript/OOP lab: viết domain mini models, validation rules và error handling không dùng framework
Mini Lab: NestJS mental model lab: module/controller/service/provider mini app, chỉ để hiểu framework như công cụ

weeks.title: Database, security, transaction và production thinking foundation

days.topic: Theory Deep Dive: SQL and data modeling: table, relation, normalization, constraints, migration mindset
Theory Deep Dive: Database performance and consistency: index, query plan, transaction, isolation, locking, N+1
Theory Deep Dive: Security and production primitives: auth/authz, password hashing, token, cache, queue, logging, monitoring, deployment
Mini Lab: Database lab: schema nhỏ, constraints, indexes, EXPLAIN, transaction rollback và lock behavior
Mini Lab: Security/production lab: password hashing, JWT mock, rate limit idea, queue/cache/logging simulation

advanced.title: Google SRE Book - Monitoring Distributed Systems

weeks.title: Project kickoff: API skeleton, public catalog và request pipeline

days.topic: Project Delivery: Review foundation: API contract, request lifecycle, validation and error principles
Project Delivery: NestJS implementation patterns: module/controller/service/DTO, common module
Project Delivery: Request pipeline implementation plan: validation, exception filter, interceptor, logging
Project Delivery: Map public catalog into project: movies, cinemas, showtimes, seats API contract
Project Delivery: Implement API skeleton, public catalog, Swagger, validation/error/logging evidence

weeks.title: PostgreSQL implementation, migrations, indexes và query review

days.topic: Project Delivery: Schema refinement: movie/cinema/screen/seat/showtime relations and constraints
Project Delivery: Migration and seed strategy: clean DB, idempotent seed, production safety
Project Delivery: Index/query review: EXPLAIN, composite index, N+1, query builder tradeoff
Project Delivery: Map DB into project APIs and admin workflows

advanced.title: PostgreSQL Docs - Indexes and ORDER BY

days.topic: Project Delivery: Implement migrations/entities/seeds, public queries and query-plan evidence

weeks.title: Authentication, authorization, RBAC và security hardening

days.topic: Project Delivery: Auth deep dive: password hashing, token lifecycle, session/logout strategy
Project Delivery: Authorization design: RBAC, permission matrix, least privilege, guard/decorator
Project Delivery: Security hardening: validation, secrets, CORS, rate limit, sensitive logging
Project Delivery: Map auth/RBAC into Movie Ticket Booking actors and protected APIs
Project Delivery: Implement auth, RBAC, protected APIs and security evidence

weeks.title: Critical consistency: seat hold, booking, ticket và idempotency

days.topic: Project Delivery: State machine: seat hold, booking, payment, ticket, check-in transitions
Project Delivery: Concurrency deep dive: race condition, row lock, isolation, deadlock, retry
Project Delivery: Idempotency: duplicate request, client retry, webhook replay, unique key strategy
Project Delivery: Map critical flow into DB/API/service transaction boundary
Project Delivery: Implement seat hold, booking, ticket, check-in and race/idempotency evidence

advanced.title: Stripe Engineering Blog - Designing Robust API Idempotency

weeks.title: Cache, queue, payment/webhook integration và semantic search

days.topic: Project Delivery: Cache deep dive: TTL, invalidation, cache-aside, stale data, when not to cache

advanced.title: Redis Docs - Distributed Locks with Redis

days.topic: Project Delivery: Queue/job deep dive: BullMQ, retry, timeout, delayed jobs, idempotent handlers
Project Delivery: Integration/AI: payment webhook, provider abstraction, embeddings, pgvector, mock provider
Project Delivery: Map cache/jobs/payment/semantic search into Movie Ticket Booking safely
Project Delivery: Implement expiry jobs, webhook replay safety, cache/search slice and integration logs

weeks.title: Observability, monitoring mindset, resilience và deployment

days.topic: Project Delivery: Observability: structured logs, request id, user id, latency, metrics/tracing mindset
Project Delivery: Resilience: timeout, retry policy, rate limit, graceful shutdown, failure simulation

advanced.title: Microsoft Azure Architecture - Circuit Breaker Pattern

days.topic: Project Delivery: Deployment: Docker, env config, secrets, migrations, health/readiness, rollback
Project Delivery: Map operational concerns into Movie Ticket Booking release
Project Delivery: Implement hardening, health checks, deploy docs, smoke tests and runbook

weeks.title: System design capstone, final evidence và mock interview

days.topic: Capstone: System design review: requirement, API, DB, state, scale, failure modes

advanced.title: Google SRE Book - Table of Contents

days.topic: Capstone: Performance/load sanity: query review, basic load test, bottleneck analysis

advanced.title: Grafana k6 Docs - Load Test Types

days.topic: Capstone: Interview deep dive: HTTP, DB, transaction, auth, cache, queue, deploy, system design

advanced.title: Google SRE Book - Addressing Cascading Failures

days.topic: Capstone: Final evidence gap closure, release note and demo route
Capstone: Final regression, demo, mock interview and mentor review

program.name: Backend NestJS - 10-week high-intensity foundation-first Movie Ticket Booking training
program.notes: Weeks 1-3 do not start the real project. Monday-Wednesday are deep theory days; Thursday-Saturday are mini labs based on that week theory. Week 4 starts the real Movie Ticket Booking project.
program.learning_principle: Đừng học backend bằng cách học framework trước. Framework chỉ là công cụ. Backend thật sự nằm ở HTTP, API design, database, authentication, authorization, transaction, cache, queue, logging, monitoring, security, scalability và deployment. Framework có thể đổi; tư duy backend thì đi theo bạn cả sự nghiệp.
